issues.description: Effect should negate this Character's effect (prevent abilities), not grant Rush keyword. 'This Character's effect is negated' means abilities are disabled, not that it gains Rush.
GiveKeyword is incorrect action type for negating effects. Should use a negation/disable mechanic or represent as removing ability to use effects.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
This Character cannot attack.
[Activate: Main] You may K.O. 1 of your {Thriller Bark Pirates} type Characters: This Character's effect is negated during this turn.
